indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and stretching exercises.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can help create a calming atmosphere conducive to yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: Hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring may be uncomfortable for prolonged periods of yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The space is largely suitable for yoga and stretching, with a large open area and natural light, but the hard flooring could be less comfortable for extended periods.
